faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University is scheduled for 02 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Young Professionals-II (YP II) at ANGRAU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) positions announced by ANGRAU.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. (Ag.) degree in Genetics & Plant Breeding, Agronomy/Soil Science, or Plant Pathology, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear in person at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ANGRAU office in Peddapuram, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 533437.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.
